prerequisites: A Bitly account with API access.
A Bitly Generic Access Token (personal access token) generated from your Bitly account API settings, used for the api_key field.
A start_date and end_date defining the reporting window to sync.

authMethods.name: API key (Bitly Generic Access Token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single api_key, which is a Bitly Generic Access Token (personal access token). Generate it from your Bitly account API settings at https://app.bitly.com/settings/api/. Bitly passes the token in requests via the Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Bitly access token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Bitly account and open the API settings page at https://app.bitly.com/settings/api/. Generate a Generic Access Token (personal access token). This token is sent as 'Authorization: Bearer {token}' by the Bitly API.

setupSteps.title: Provide the api_key
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated Bitly access token into the connector's required api_key field. This field is stored as a secret.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync date range
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date and end_date fields to define the reporting window the connector will pull data for.
